commit.message: HDDS-9902. Decommission: Admin monitor should call RM.checkContainerState to check for under-replication (#5770)

verification.payload:
tree f7c030d12acae1c98d489b3f97f17feab788d98d
parent 6cdc3795836c115858130ea540d17a7bdf976723
author Stephen O'Donnell <stephen.odonnell@gmail.com> 1702503258 +0000
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1702503258 +0000

HDDS-9902. Decommission: Admin monitor should call RM.checkContainerState to check for under-replication (#5770)

files.patch:
@@ -179,6 +179,7 @@ public void testDecommissionNodeWaitsForContainersToReplicate()
     DatanodeAdminMonitorTestUtil
             .mockGetContainerReplicaCount(
                     repManager,
+                    true,
                     HddsProtos.LifeCycleState.CLOSED,
                     DECOMMISSIONED,
                     IN_SERVICE,
@@ -205,6 +206,7 @@ public void testDecommissionNodeWaitsForContainersToReplicate()
     DatanodeAdminMonitorTestUtil
             .mockGetContainerReplicaCount(
                     repManager,
+                    false,
                     HddsProtos.LifeCycleState.CLOSED,
                     IN_SERVICE,
                     IN_SERVICE,
@@ -376,6 +378,7 @@ public void testDecommissionNotBlockedByDeletingContainers()
     DatanodeAdminMonitorTestUtil
         .mockGetContainerReplicaCount(
             repManager,
+            true,
             HddsProtos.LifeCycleState.DELETING,
             DECOMMISSIONED,
             IN_SERVICE);
@@ -404,6 +407,7 @@ public void testDecommissionNodeWithUnrecoverableECContainer()
     DatanodeAdminMonitorTestUtil
         .mockGetContainerReplicaCountForEC(
             repManager,
+            true,
             HddsProtos.LifeCycleState.CLOSED,
             new ECReplicationConfig(3, 2),
             Triple.of(DECOMMISSIONING, dn1, 1),
@@ -432,6 +436,7 @@ public void testDecommissionNodeWithUnrecoverableECContainer()
     DatanodeAdminMonitorTestUtil
         .mockGetContainerReplicaCountForEC(
             repManager,
+            false,
             HddsProtos.LifeCycleState.CLOSED,
             new ECReplicationConfig(3, 2),
             Triple.of(DECOMMISSIONING, dn1, 1),
@@ -459,6 +464,7 @@ public void testDecommissionAbortedWhenNodeInUnexpectedState()
     DatanodeAdminMonitorTestUtil
             .mockGetContainerReplicaCount(
                     repManager,
+                    true,
                     HddsProtos.LifeCycleState.CLOSED,
                     DECOMMISSIONED,
                     IN_SERVICE,
@@ -496,6 +502,7 @@ public void testDecommissionAbortedWhenNodeGoesDead()
     DatanodeAdminMonitorTestUtil
             .mockGetContainerReplicaCount(
                     repManager,
+                    true,
                     HddsProtos.LifeCycleState.CLOSED,
                     DECOMMISSIONED,
                     IN_SERVICE,
@@ -590,12 +597,13 @@ public void testMaintenanceEndsWhileReplicatingContainers()
     DatanodeAdminMonitorTestUtil
             .mockGetContainerReplicaCount(
                     repManager,
+                    true,
                     HddsProtos.LifeCycleState.CLOSED,
                     IN_MAINTENANCE,
                     ENTERING_MAINTENANCE,
                     IN_MAINTENANCE);
 
-    // Add the node to the monitor, it should transiting to
+    // Add the node to the monitor, it should transition to
     // REPLICATE_CONTAINERS as the containers are under-replicated for
     // maintenance.
     monitor.startMonitoring(dn1);
